scripts.build:driver-pwa: npm run build:driver-pwa-sw && npm run build:driver-pwa-push-bootstrap && cd apps/driver-pwa && npm run build && cd ../.. && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='apps/driver-pwa/dist/index.html';let h=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!h.includes('push-bootstrap.js')){h=h.replace('</body>','    <script type=\"module\" src=\"/push-bootstrap.js\"></script>\\n  </body>');fs.writeFileSync(p,h);}"
scripts.test: vitest run --config apps/backend/vitest.config.ts && cd apps/frontend && npx vitest run src/components/ErrorBoundary.test.tsx src/pages/EquipmentTypesPage.test.tsx src/pages/Users.test.tsx && cd ../.. && node scripts/lint-deps.test.mjs
scripts.test:a11y: axe https://app.ih35dispatch.com/dashboard https://app.ih35dispatch.com/loads https://app.ih35dispatch.com/settlements https://app.ih35dispatch.com/banking https://app.ih35dispatch.com/drivers https://app.ih35dispatch.com/customers --tags wcag2a,wcag2aa --exit
